text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Soon... Soon, I'll be running in a classic G1 race,
but...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Am I strong enough to compete in it? Even if Dia
won't be running in it, I'll still be going against a
lot of other strong racers.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I have to see just how strong my rivals are with my
very own eyes!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Everyone! I want to go watch my rivals run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, in preparation for her classic G1 race, we
join Tokai Teio, Mejiro McQueen, and other
veteran Umamusume at the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The star-studded group also includes the
blazingly fast Silence Suzuka, Hokkaido native
Special Week, and the always unpredictable Gold
Ship.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You should first acquaint yourself with this year's
strongest Umamusume, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter, patter!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the final stretch, and here she comes!
Brusquement is pulling away! Three lengths...
four... five full lengths for a commanding victory!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Empress Air Groove has taught her well! What
astonishing speed and strength she's shown us
today!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, was that all she had? There's still much she
could improve on, but the potential is there.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow... I didn't know she was your daughter, Air
Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
She most certainly is not! My mother was the one
who trained her! After she quit racing, she
founded a school to teach Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Brusquement was one of her top students, which
is why I am acting as her advisor here at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Air Groove. She's the vice president of the
student council, and she's known as the Empress
due to her high ideals and strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her mother was a prominent runner in her own
right, and it seems she's been mentoring
Brusquement.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I have a question for Brusquement's
trainer! Are you considering entering her into
classic G1 races in the future?

text_block_list.name: Astute Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. I was debating whether to focus on the
Classic Triple Crown or the Triple Tiara...

text_block_list.name: Astute Trainer
text_block_list.text:
But since she has won two 1,800-meter races
back-to-back, longer distance races shouldn't be
an issue. As such, we'll be taking on the Triple
Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Astute Trainer
text_block_list.text: I assume you have no objections, Brusquement?

text_block_list.name: Brusquement
text_block_list.text: No, sir.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ooh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown... Sounds like you've got a new
rival, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Y-yes... But...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll be an undisputed fan favorite
during the tour!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What would you say her odds of winning are?!
And what races do you plan on having her run
leading up to the tour?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Does something seem... off to you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't really know how to put it, but... The
reporters are so excited... They almost look
ecstatic with anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've never been swarmed like that. Not even
close...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
She totally owned that race, so of course the
reporters aren't gonna leave her alone.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I guess, but still...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Doesn't all this take you back, Suzuka?
Hearing all their enthusiastic questioning and
seeing their camera flashing?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Reporters crowded up to me the same way when I
was running the Classics. Was it the same for you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. Though I wasn't that strong at the time...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
They were still quite eager to interview me. I
didn't really like the rowdiness of it all...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Spe and Suzuka experienced the same thing too?
Teio got tons of fanfare too, of course.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (But how come no one's ever fussed over me?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The press conference comes to a close, but
Kitasan Black looks lost in thought the rest of the
day.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe it's just my imagination... The Classic
Triple Crown is essentially a festival that only
comes around once in your life...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Brusquement is being treated like the star of the
show, just like Teio, Suzuka, and Spe were in the
past.)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (But I'm not. The same way they're naturally in the spotlight, I'm naturally left out of it. Am I the only one seeing things from a different perspective?)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(This must be due to our skill difference. I have to
work much, much harder if I want to close that
gap!)
